• Implements a mining game with procedural terrain, upgrades, chat, and multiplayer via MQTT.
  • Provides UI components: mobile controls, settings, shop, dashboard, warp, and custom modals.
  • Handles sound, cloud sync, host election, and custom texture loading.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    const Shop = new ShopSystem();

This HTML page defines a full‑screen canvas game with rich UI overlays styled using CSS variables and bezels. JavaScript manages player movement, mining logic, upgrades, chat, server sync, and persistent saves, while a modular sound manager and custom modal system handle audio and user prompts. The code also supports mobile controls, custom textures, and automatic host election for multiplayer sessions.
